cache_timeout.description: Duration (in seconds) of the caching timeout for this dataset.

edit_url.description: The URL for editing the dataset.

extra.description: JSON string containing extra configuration elements.

fetch_values_predicate.description: Predicate used when fetching values from the dataset.

filter_select.description: SELECT filter applied to the dataset.

filter_select_enabled.description: If the SELECT filter is enabled.

granularity_sqla.description: Name of temporal column used for time filtering for SQL datasources. This field is deprecated, use `granularity` instead.

is_sqllab_view.description: If the dataset is a SQL Lab view.

sql.description: A SQL statement that defines the dataset.

table_name.description: The name of the table associated with the dataset.

time_grain_sqla.description: List of temporal granularities supported by the dataset.

verbose_map.description: Mapping from raw name to verbose name.

form_data.description: Form data from the Explore controls used to form the chart's data query.

message.description: Any message related to the processed request.

cache_timeout.description: Duration (in seconds) of the caching timeout for this chart.

certified_by.description: Person or group that has certified this dashboard.

changed_on_humanized.description: Timestamp of the last modification in human readable form.

description_markeddown.description: Sanitized HTML version of the chart description.

edit_url.description: The URL for editing the slice.

form_data.description: Form data associated with the slice.

is_managed_externally.description: If the chart is managed outside externally.

modified.description: Last modification in human readable form.

query_context.description: The context associated with the query.
